title: GET READY - Summer Special
subtitle: 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco
description: GET READY Northampton — Summer Special featuring the biggest 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco hits! Tickets from £7.
fullDescription:
Join us for a Summer special of GET READY featuring the BIGGEST hits of 60s/70s Motown, Soul and Disco! 🪩

Our popular sell-out event is back! Come and join us at the Picturedrome, where we'll have a night of 1960s and 70s Motown, Soul and Disco hits!
highlights: 🪩 Summer Special: The perfect Friday night out — 8pm to Midnight!|🎵 Legendary Floorfillers: The Jacksons, Stevie Wonder, Chic, Diana Ross, James Brown and more|🎟 Tickets From £7: Great value for four hours of the biggest hits|🏆 Boombastic Quality: From the team that's been selling out events for 10+ years
soundtrack: The Jacksons · Al Wilson · Stevie Wonder · The Four Tops · Rick James · Chic · Sister Sledge · The Temptations · James Brown · Diana Ross · The Supremes · The Marvelettes · Martha Reeves and the Vandellas · Ray Charles
